ab: ima’ ku mamaliku ka haca?
hiya’ ga mama’ mu.
ima’ ku kanayril ka haca?
hiya’ ga qumisuwan na kanayril mu.
ima’ ku ulaqi’ ka haca?
hiya’ ga suwayi’ na mamaliku mu.
nanuwan ku patuwawun ni yaya’ su’?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: hiya’ ga hitay.
nanuwan ku patuwawun ni yaba’ su’?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: hiya’ ga papsibaq.
hiya’ ga suwayi’ na mamaliku su’ qu?
iqaat, hiya’ ga rawin ni suwayi’ na mamaliku mu.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: hiya’ ga qumisuwan na kanayril su’ qu?
iqaat, hiya’ ga suwayi’ na kanayril mu.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: papiya’ kahabaag ku qutux naha’ cu imu?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: imagal kahabaag ku qutux naha’ cu imu.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: papiya’ ku ulaqi’ imu mamu?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: sapaat kahabaag ku ulaqi’ niyam.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: papiya’ ku suwayi’ na mamaliku ru suwayi’ na kanayril su’?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: ukas suwayi’ na mamaliku mu, tugal ku suwayi’ na kanayril mu.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: papiya’ ku yulah ru iyah su’?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: ukas a yulah ru iyah mu.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: papiya’ ku matasasuwayi’ na mamaliku ru kanaril su’?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: ukas a matasasuwayi’ na mamaliku ru kanayril mu.
matasasuwayi’ cimu qu?
uwal, hiya’ ga yulah mu.
Itaal cimu qu?
uwal, Itaal cami.
hiya’ ga Itaal uwi qu?
uwal ga, hiya’ ga Itaal uwi.
